title: LevelUp Attributes
description: Adds a simple RPG-style leveling system that increases player attributes as they level up.
body:
# 🛡️ LevelUp Attributes | 100-Level Progression

Enhance your Minecraft gameplay with a lightweight, vanilla-friendly leveling system inspired by survivors-style progression. This datapack adds permanent attribute upgrades, turning every bit of XP you earn into meaningful character growth.



## 🌟 How It Works

As you gain experience by killing mobs, your character automatically levels up. Each level grants permanent attribute bonuses, providing steady and balanced progression from level 1 to level 100.



## 🕹️ Key Features

- **100 Levels of Progression:**  Progress smoothly from level 1 to 100 with consistent and balanced rewards.
  
- **Permanent Attribute Scaling:** Gain lasting upgrades to Max Health, Attack Damage, Movement Speed, and Armor.
  
- **Live Stat Tracker:** View your current level and attributes anytime using `/trigger stats`.

- **Full Reset System:** Instantly reset your level and all attribute bonuses using `/trigger reset`.



## 📜 Commands

- `/trigger stats` – Displays your current level and active attribute bonuses.
  
- `/trigger reset` – Resets your level and removes all granted attribute modifiers.



## 🚀 Getting Started

1. Install the datapack into your world.

2. Gain XP by killing mobs.

3. Watch your attributes improve naturally with each level.
